M0230_PRI_DGN_ICD (M0230) Primary Diagnosis and ICD Code - a The values available describing the primary diagnosis. CHAR 7 x x
M0240_OTH_DGN1_SEV (M0240) Other Diagnosis Severity Rating - b Other diagnosis severity rating (0-4) b. 00 = Asymptomatic, no treatment needed at this time. 
01 = Symptoms well controlled with current therapy.
02 = Symptoms controlled with difficulty, affecting daily functioning; patient needs ongoing
